    Constructor parameters in de.uka.ilkd.key.rule with type arguments of type NewVarcond
    Modifier
    Constructor
    Description
     
    TacletApplPart(Sequent ifseq, ImmutableList<NewVarcond> varsNew, ImmutableList<NotFreeIn> varsNotFreeIn, ImmutableList<NewDependingOn> varsNewDependingOn, ImmutableList<VariableCondition> variableConditions)
    constructs a new TacletApplPart object with the given Sequent, a list of variables that are new, a list of variable pairs that represent the NotFreeIn relation and a list of additional generic variable conditions.

    TacletBuilder.addVarsNew(NewVarcond nv)
    adds a new new variable to the variable conditions of the Taclet: v is new.
    Method parameters in de.uka.ilkd.key.rule.tacletbuilder with type arguments of type NewVarcond
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void
    TacletBuilder.addVarsNew(ImmutableList<NewVarcond> list)
    adds a list of new variables to the variable conditions of the Taclet: v is new for all v's in the given list
